description_long: This modern bungalow features a flat, dark roof and a clean, geometric facade with large windows and a mix of white and wood-textured exterior walls. The property is surrounded by a low hedge and vibrant flower beds, with a wooden deck encircling much of the house. The front includes a driveway leading to a double garage and a small entry porch. The backyard is equipped with a swimming pool, a round hot tub, a patio area with outdoor furniture, and a green lawn. Multiple glass doors and expansive windows provide ample natural light and a seamless indoor-outdoor connection. The landscaping is meticulously maintained, with pathways and decorative elements enhancing the overall curb appeal.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large windows, wood and white exterior, surrounded by landscaped gardens, a pool, and a driveway with a garage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, double garage, driveway, and a small porch with flower beds and hedges.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, garage, and the transition to the backyard with visible outdoor amenities.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the swimming pool, hot tub, patio furniture, and large glass doors opening to the backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the deck, additional windows, and the connection between the front and rear outdoor spaces.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on all facades
